headline: Fed Meeting, PPI, Nvidia Confernce: What to Watch Next Week
summary: The Federal Reserve's interest-rate decision dominates next week's calendar. Investors will also closely monitor February’s producer-price index for inflation signals, alongside a corporate earnings slate featuring Micron, Lululemon and FedEx.
